subcodes.first_line: The veil of falsehood and cruelty hath obscured the light of truth and fidelity, and piety lieth tormented beneath the claws of transgression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حجاب کذب و جفا نور صدق و وفا را ستر نموده و تقوی تحت براثن طغی معذب گشته شعله
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
